headline: Shift4 Payments vs Corpay: Two Fintech Giants Fighting for the Future of Payments
summary: Shift4 Payments (NYSE: FOUR) and Corpay (NYSE: CPAY) both closed out 2025 with earnings that tell very different stories. Shift4 is betting on owning the physical experience economy globally. Corpay is rotating its portfolio toward corporate payments and cross-border flows. Same industry, completely different playbooks. Luxury Resorts Carry Shift4. Corporate Spend Carries Corpay. Shift4 posted ... Shift4 Payments vs Corpay: Two Fintech Giants Fighting for the Future of Payments
